summary: Jang Hyun travels to the city of Jeonggyeong in Eastland, where he joins a merchant group led by Jang Heon for safe passage. While traveling, they are intercepted by bandits demanding a toll, leading to a skirmish that is being broadcast by a streamer known as Alley Boss. As the conflict escalates, Jang Hyun is called upon to defend the group, ultimately triggering a quest from the bandits when they offer a reward for his assistance.
key_moments: Jang Hyun identifies the location of the Hyuncheonmajong sect.
Jang Hyun joins the Jeonggyeong merchant group and begins a journey to Jeonggyeong.
The merchant caravan is ambushed by bandits on Mt. Seongho.
Jang Hyun is prompted by both the merchant guard and the bandits to intervene in the fight, triggering a system quest.
